title: 排名变化最大的公司及其营业总收入

meta.source_sql:
WITH ranking_2024 AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit DESC) AS rank_2024
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2024Q3' AND stock_abbr IN ('云南白药', '白云山', '华润三九')
),
ranking_2025 AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, total_operating_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit DESC) AS rank_2025
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3' AND stock_abbr IN ('云南白药', '白云山', '华润三九')
),
rank_change AS (
    SELECT r24.stock_code, r24.stock_abbr, r24.rank_2024, r25.rank_2025, ABS(r24.rank_2024 - r25.rank_2025) AS rank_change_abs, r25.total_operating_revenue
    FROM ranking_2024 r24
    INNER JOIN ranking_2025 r25 ON r24.stock_code = r25.stock_code
)
SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, rank_2024, rank_2025, rank_change_abs, total_operating_revenue
FROM rank_change
ORDER BY rank_change_abs DESC
LIMIT 3
